Off Calendar Aug-07-2012 Granted Per Written Order

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF UNIVERSITY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Reinstate Complaint is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

Off Calendar Feb-22-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Mtn To Vacate Dismissal And Reinstate Complt
Off Calendar Dec-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Univertity of San Francisco's Motion to Vacate Dismissal issued on 5/13/2011 and Reinstate Complaint is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Dismissal is ordered vacated. Order signed. Court ordered case scheduled for an Order to Show Cause re: Dismissal pursuant to CRC 3.1385 on 2/16/2012 at 2:00 PM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
